title: %Error-ASSIGNIN: ... Assigning to input/const variable:
body:
I am getting errors that say:

%Error-ASSIGNIN: /rdata/dub/verif/ylevhari/verilator_test/fixed_src/dwc_ddrphy_pll.v:899:17: Assigning to input/const variable: 'vp'
  899 |         .vp({vp,vp}),

This is an assignment to an inout signal, which is legal verilog, how can I override, fix this ?
